theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Health and wellness apps require trust, warmth, and calmness. Moving away from clinical blue and AI purple, we use a grounded palette of deep forest greens, warm bone-whites, and terracotta to make biometric data feel natural and human.

typography.rules: Avoid Inter/Roboto. Use Manrope for headings and body, and JetBrains Mono for workout timers and biometric numbers.

cards.bento_style: Use NativeWind: bg-white rounded-[24px] border border-[#E8E8E4] shadow-sm. No heavy dropshadows.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2C4C3B] rounded-full py-4 px-6 flex-row justify-center items-center
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F3F3F0] rounded-full py-4 px-6 flex-row justify-center items-center

navigation.tab_bar: bg-white border-t border-[#E8E8E4] pb-8 pt-4 px-6 flex-row justify-between items-center. Hide standard React Navigation header, build custom headers per screen.

data_visualization.health_ring: react-native-svg. strokeWidth=14. Background track: #E8E8E4. Foreground track: #2C4C3B with rounded caps. Use reanimated for dashoffset.
data_visualization.charts: react-native-svg for line/bar charts in History. Soft curves, fillOpacity for areas under lines.

forms.inputs: bg-[#F9F9F6] border border-[#E8E8E4] rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 text-base
forms.labels: text-sm font-semibold text-[#1C2A21] mb-2 uppercase tracking-wide

Dashboard.layout: Scrollable. Top: Greeting + Small Avatar. Center: Large Health Score Ring (0-100) with score text inside. Bottom: 2-column Bento grid of daily summaries (Sleep, HR, Steps).
Dashboard.actions: FAB (Floating Action Button) fixed at bottom right for quick-entry shortcuts (weight, BP, meals).

ActiveWorkout.layout: Full screen, dark mode variant (bg-[#1A2F24]). Top: Activity classification chip (e.g., Walking with lucide icon). Center: Massive duration timer (JetBrains Mono). Bottom: 2-column stats (Steps, Intensity/BPM) and large circular Start/Stop/Pause buttons.
ActiveWorkout.animation: Pulse effect on the timer or heart rate icon using reanimated.

HealthLog.layout: List of distinct form cards for Weight, Blood Pressure (Sys/Dia), Resting HR, Medications, Nutrition (cals/macros), Water, and Sleep.
HealthLog.ux: Use sliders or stepper buttons for numbers to minimize keyboard popups on mobile.

HistoryAnalytics.layout: Accessible via Dashboard. Tabbed or segmented control at top (Steps, Weight, BP, Activity). Central area shows line/bar charts using react-native-svg.
HistoryAnalytics.styling: Keep chart lines smooth (bezier). Use #2C4C3B for primary data line.

AIInsights.layout: Top: Abstract organic background image with generated health score overlaid. Center: Category Radar chart or bar chart (Cardio, Activity, Nutrition, etc.). Bottom: Ranked list of actionable AI suggestions with terracotta accent markers.
AIInsights.states: Include a visible Refresh/Recalculate button and an Error/Retry empty state for the AI generation.

ProfileSetup.layout: Form for Age, Height, Weight, Fitness Goals. Section for Import Health Record (JSON/CSV) with an upload icon.

images.description: Abstract organic 3d shapes in sage green and bone-white. Use as header background for AI Insights or Profile.
Macro photography of glowing biometric ring. Use as overlay behind the main Dashboard Health Score Ring or Workout screen.
A runner sprinting in golden sunlight. Use for workout empty state or goal visualization.
Vibrant flat lay of nutritious meal preps. Use for the Nutrition logging section or AI diet suggestions.

testing_requirements.attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (mapped as testID property in React Native components). Example: <TouchableOpacity testID="workout-start-button" />.

tech_stack_rules: Use standard .js files for all components. Do NOT use .tsx.
Use react-native-reanimated for micro-interactions and transitions.
Use react-native-svg for drawing rings and charts.
